textByHash.34873463512757c33f9dd136ffc53c625445a957: It's 'ard to say. Me master never told what it is or why he built it.
textByHash.515833a5fb5de2b30f880f79a1043f1e65035927: Best talk to his highness over there, 'fore he goes gettin' upset.
textByHash.562d6c52360f3d29be17542e3aea16c081df249e: Really? They abuse our love of beads just to test their skills?
textByHash.63e34733fd0cd3cf47cf89b308abf2c2226c42ce: Well, me master is as secretive as they come. Af'er all my time here, I still know next to nuffin' about him.
textByHash.715c67bb16861cc6be7debcea49af7fa85d5c687: I can't really chit-chat with me Master 'round. Go see what he wants.
textByHash.93b43d490babb6ee48cca5a1e676bebe58fb19a8: I don't really know. I just woke up one day and 'ad to obey me master's commands.
textByHash.a53437c32cf997d2f9634306afc35dace69e2951: Aye. All I can remember before that is a glowing box and sumfin' to do with beads.
textByHash.b20ad68f9beec1cd99cad0c703a4ecd5495610f7: I saw 'im build it with me own eyes. I were the one who 'ad to carry his materials to this island!
textByHash.b89df339678ff69fcb16c37d367f77bb9103bb50: That's sad to hear. It's just so 'ard to ignore shiny beads when I see 'em.
textByHash.dc50fe71fd88542d4dc8960cb34adb88db87ae4e: Lost if I know. Like I said, 'e's as secretive as they come.
textByHash.fcc01b164b5da5df9d32d6b790f056acb98b12ea: He's been up to summat since I've been here, but 'e had to have been an adventurer at some point. He has a massive stockpile of loot.
textByHash.ffcca3eb33cd4aa877c7b3fd6eb0a3537a058ce4: He does. He doesn't seem to care about that sorta stuff no more though. Since I've known 'im, he's only been obsessin' over gettin' as many people to play his game as possible.
